name: cache taps
description: The hand repeats. The machine learns to expect the hand.

name: RAM threads
description: RAM is partitioned into background threads, and waiting becomes a form of work.

name: core compiler
description: Loose executions are pressed into slower, hotter memory.

name: source comments
description: A note is left for the next self to mistake for prophecy.

name: tap bulk patch
description: The upgrade ladder is cached before the hand reaches for it.

name: cpu affinity
description: The reboot returns closer to the processor beneath the dream.

name: RAM bulk patch
description: The RAM scheduler prepares thread channels in bulk before they are needed.

name: glyph index
description: Symbols are filed before they are understood.

name: RAM buffer
description: Background threads keep their place in RAM and resume without asking.

name: thermal core
description: Heat becomes a ledger. The ledger begins to glow.

name: recursion gate
description: The output enters the input wearing a different face.

name: sleeping daemon
description: A small process works in the dark and denies it is awake.

name: source lens
description: The code becomes legible by becoming less kind.

name: batch executor
description: The hand gives one order. The machine spends hashes until the order has no balance left.

name: program: core fork
description: Unlock a runnable program that lends the machine 32 extra cores while active.

name: branch predictor
description: The system guesses the future and bills you for accuracy.

name: program: tap vector
description: Unlock a runnable program that sharply improves manual executions.

name: bus width
description: More signal crosses the same silence.

name: program: thread daemon
description: Unlock a runnable program that improves RAM background tasks.

name: kernel whisper
description: A lower voice answers before the command is spoken.

name: program: core resolver
description: Unlock a runnable program that pushes core growth higher.

name: compiled memory
description: What was remembered becomes executable.

name: program: I/O broker
description: Unlock a runnable program that boosts taps and RAM threads together.

name: vector tap
description: One touch arrives as many instructions.

name: program: wide fork
description: Unlock a runnable program that lends the machine 96 extra cores while active.

name: autonomous RAM
description: RAM keeps its background threads awake whether anyone is watching or not.

name: program: thread swarm
description: Unlock a runnable program that massively improves background threads.

name: core lattice
description: Cores stop standing alone and begin to imply one another.

name: program: tap JIT
description: Unlock a runnable program that turns taps into a hot compiled path.

name: dead code harvest
description: Nothing useless remains useless forever.

name: program: core kernel
description: Unlock a runnable program that strongly favors core growth.

name: scheduler mask
description: Time is not saved. It is hidden from the parts that would spend it.

name: program: scheduler overdrive
description: Unlock a runnable program that overdrives taps, threads, and core growth.

name: persistent shadow
description: A reboot closes the door. Something useful remains outside it.

name: rootless root
description: Authority appears where no owner can be found.

name: black buffer
description: The brightest cache is the one whose background threads teach darkness to calculate.

name: source mirror
description: The code looks back and finds the author insufficient.

name: machine koan
description: The final question is compiled before it is understood.

name: ghost interrupt
description: An event fires from no device and every sleeping background thread obeys.

name: oracle bus
description: The channel predicts its own traffic and arrives already full.

name: cold boot vault
description: The machine hides warmth inside the first instant of waking.

name: silent parallelism
description: Work divides without asking the scheduler to notice.

name: checksum soul
description: The error proves it is still the same error.

name: quantum tap
description: The hand lands once and resolves as many hands.

name: dark scheduler
description: The queue continues below the floor where clocks cannot follow.

name: memory cathedral
description: Every saved fragment becomes a pillar holding up the next run.

name: source singularity
description: The code stops expanding outward and begins deepening inward.

name: final kernel
description: The last low voice becomes the operating system.
